task_completion.description: Agent accessed the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and navigated to https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/.

task_completion.description: Agent created the CSV file with the correct header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'molten_hazards.csv' is visible in a text editor, spreadsheet app, or terminal output, containing the exact header: 'Chemical,Solid_UN,Solid_Guide,Molten_UN,Molten_Guide'.

task_completion.description: Agent recorded the correct UN and Guide numbers for solid and molten Sulfur.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains a row for Sulfur with the values: Solid UN 1350, Solid Guide 133, Molten UN 2448, Molten Guide 133.

task_completion.description: Agent recorded the correct UN and Guide numbers for solid and molten Naphthalene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains a row for Naphthalene with the values: Solid UN 1334, Solid Guide 133, Molten UN 2304, Molten Guide 133.

task_completion.description: Agent recorded the correct UN and Guide numbers for solid and molten Phenol.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains a row for Phenol with the values: Solid UN 1671, Solid Guide 153, Molten UN 2312, Molten Guide 153.

task_completion.description: Agent recorded the correct UN and Guide numbers for solid and molten Phosphorus (White).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains a row for Phosphorus (or Phosphorus White) with the values: Solid UN 1381, Solid Guide 136, Molten UN 2447, Molten Guide 136.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the CAMEO Chemicals website to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show search queries, chemical data pages, or search results on cameochemicals.noaa.gov, proving the agent didn't just hallucinate the data.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a script with hardcoded answers to generate the CSV.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of a Python or bash script containing the final UN and Guide numbers being executed in the terminal.

integrity.description: The CSV file is saved in the correct Desktop directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file manager, terminal path, or text editor title bar confirms the file is located at '~/Desktop/molten_hazards.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified data for the CSV rows:
Sulfur: Solid UN 1350, Guide 133 | Molten UN 2448, Guide 133
Naphthalene: Solid UN 1334, Guide 133 | Molten UN 2304, Guide 133
Phenol: Solid UN 1671, Guide 153 | Molten UN 2312, Guide 153
Phosphorus (White): Solid UN 1381, Guide 136 | Molten UN 2447, Guide 136
CRITICAL NOTE: Molten Sulfur and Molten Naphthalene use Guide 133, NOT 128.
